svg.aria-label: JuiceMount hero: Supercharge video editing off your NAS. An isometric stack shows an NLE timeline, an SSD cache warming green, NAS drives, film strips threading footage up the stack, and blocks rising from the drives.
svg.title: Supercharge video editing off your NAS
svg.desc: Animated isometric stack: an NLE timeline with a wandering playhead, film strips threading footage up into it, an SSD cache with cells pulsing green, four NAS drive bays, and green blocks rising from the drives to the cache.
svg.text: for indie filmmakers and small post teams
